title: KOLASIB-AH JANJATIYA GARIMA UTSAV 2026 LEH JAN BHAGIDARI ABHIYAN HMAN A NI
content:
679/2026-2027

Kolasib, 22nd May, 2026:Ministry of Tribal Affairs, Government of India hmalakna in leh Deputy Commissioner's Office, Kolasib District buatsaihin Taitesena Hall, Venglai, Kolasib-ah 'Janjatiya Garima Utsav 2026' leh 'Jan Bhagidari Abhiyan' hman a ni. He hun hi May ni 18 atanga ni 25, 2026 chhung hman tur a ni a, thupui atan 'Sabse Door, Sabse Pehle' tih hman a ni.

He hun hmanpuitu Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan vawiina mipui tana tangkai tur programme buatsaih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Hun hlu tak senga mipuite hriat tur pawimawh leh hamthatna scheme hrang hrang department ten an chhawpchhuak thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, an inbuatsaihna tha tak chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi. Department hrang hrangte thawhhona a that thu leh, vantlang mipuite tana hriattur pawimawh scheme hrang hrang an lo hrilhfiahnaah hian rah tha a chhuah ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Janjatiya Garima Utsav hman chhung hian mipuite tana hamthatna hrang hrang pholan niin, mipui rawn kalte hnenah scheme hrang hrang sawifiahna hun hman thin a ni a. Department hrang hrang tel te leh an thil chhawpchhuah te chu hetiang hi a ni:

1. Health Department: X-ray, TB rinhlelh khak lak, damdawi sem leh BP & Sugar endikna.

2. Women & Child Development (DPO): Scheme hrang hrang 6 an chhawpchhuak.

3. Power & Electricity (P&E): Roof-top Solar scheme.

4. Public Health Engineering (PHE): Ruahtui khawl dan leh tuihna humhalh dan inzirtirna.

5. BSNL: FTTH free wifi connection leh free prepaid 4G.

6. UD&PA: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - UTAM 2.0 scheme.

7. Agriculture: National Mission on Edible Oils - Oil Palm (NMEO-OP) 2025-2026 hnuaia Oil Palm awareness campaign leh PM KISAN Scheme.

8. Local Administration Department (LAD): 15th Finance Commission hnuaia hnathawh hrang hrangte.

9. DRDO: PMAY-G, PMKSY 2.0 leh MGNREGS aia VIKSIT Bharat-GRAM that biknate.

10. PWD: PMGSY Scheme hnuaia hna kal mek (ongoing works) leh April 2026 thlenga hma an sawn dan (progress report).

11. Samagra Shiksha: Zirlaite hnenah story book sem a ni a. Blind school-ah blind football, mitdel sana leh calculator te an pe a, heng bakah hian tiang leh walker te an pe thin bawk a ni.

12. State Bank of India (SBI)

13. Mizoram Rural Bank (MRB)

14. NABARD

ISSUED BY : DISTRICT INFORMATION & PUBLIC RELATIONS OFFICER, KOLASIB DISTRICT

title: SERCHHIP DISTRICT-AH VOHBIKTE TANA HMUNHMA BUATSAIH DAN ‘BARRIER FREE ENVIRONMENT FOR PwD’ CHU COMMISSIONER, PERSONS WITH DISABILITIES HOVA ULUK TAKA ENFIAH A NI
content:
678/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, 22ndMay 2026:Vawiin khan 'Accessible India Campaign' hnuaiah Pi Vanlaldiki Sailo, Commissioner, Persons with Disabilities (PwD) kaihhruai Access Audit Team-te’n Serchhip khawpui huamchhunga sawrkar hmunhma hrang hrangahte, rualbanlote (vohbikte) tana awlsam zawka luh chhuah theihna (Access Audit) an siam dante endikna an nei a. DC Office, District Hospital, Govt. Serchhip College, Shalom Special School leh Govt. Serchhip Higher Secondary School-te endik a ni.

Mizoramah Office of the Commissioner, Persons with Disabilities hmalaknain ni 21 February, 2025 atang khan 'Access Audit' hi neih tan a ni a. Vawiin May ni 22, 2026 hian Serchhip District hmun pawimawh tak takte hi enfiah niin, Commissioner Pi Vanlaldiki Sailo chuan Serchhip-a hmun pawimawhahte vohbikte tan hmunhma nuam tak siam a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, abikin Serchhip District Hospital leh Govt. Serchhip College te chu vohbikte tana hmunhma buatsaih kawngah an fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Serchhip District Hospital chu District Hospital dangte tan pawh entawntlak a tih thu  a sawi bawk.

Commissioner Pi Vanlaldiki Sailo chuan ram changkang apiangah vohbikte an ngaihsak zual thu sawiin "Pianphunga rualbanlote’n pangngai taka nun an hman ve theih nan, a tulna apiangah kan tanpui an ngai hle a ni," a ti a. Sawrkar laipui duh dan angin, sawrkar pisaah te, zirna inah te, Biak In leh vantlang mipui punkhawmna hmunahte rualbanlote (vohbikte) tan hmunhma nuam (accessible environment) kan buatsaih zel a tul hle a ni, a ti a; wheelchair hman ngaihna hmun te, mitdelte tana braille tarna hmun siam dan te, mipui punkhawmna vantlang building hrang hranga an kalvelna tur hmunhma buatsaih dan tur ruahmanna (drawing) te a sem nghal bawk.

Vawiina Access Audit neihna-ah hian Pi Lalchhanhimi, SDC; Pi Caryll Lalpari, CDPO; Pu K. Lalhmingchhuana, JE PWD Building Division; Pu Benjamin Zirthansanga, DSWO representative; Pu Lalhlimpuia, Special Educator, Samagra; Pi R. Laldampuii, Special Educator Samagra; Pu C. Lalrindika, I&PR aiawhte’n Audit Team-te hi an tawiawm a ni.

India ram pumpuiah Access Audit hi chak taka kalpui mek niin Mizoramah pawh district 9-ah he programme hi kalpui tawh niin, Mizoram pumpuiah endikna hi neih chhuah vek tum a ni.

title: Briefing on Important Matters Relating to the Special Intensive Revision for Voluntary Organisations and Block Political Party Leaders
content:
100/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 22nd May, 2026:Briefing regarding Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of the Electoral Roll was held at Hnahthial DC Meeting Hall No. II under the chairmanship of the Electoral Registration Officer (ERO) Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte. The programme was attended by representatives of various NGOs - YMA, MHIP and MUP; members of the MJA as well as block political party leaders.

Addressing the gathering, the ERO stated that the SIR exercise is a significant initiative aimed at ensuring a clean, accurate and error-free Electoral Roll (e-roll). He therefore appealed to all stakeholders present to extend their full cooperation towards the successful implementation of the revision process.

He informed the meeting that the existing electoral roll would not be valid for the SIR, adding that the last Intensive Roll Revision of this nature was carried out during 2002–2004.

The ERO further explained that Booth Level Officers (BLOs) would distribute Enumeration Forms to every household and subsequently collect the completed forms from which a draft electoral roll would be prepared.

He also stated that the ongoing mapping process had revealed that nearly 15% of individuals were not reflected in the existing electoral roll. Hearings would therefore be conducted for such cases, as well as for persons whose names might not appear in the draft roll due to non-submission of Enumeration Forms or any other reasons.

Describing the participants as responsible and influential members of society who possess close knowledge of the people within their respective localities, the ERO emphasized their crucial role in ensuring a transparent and accurate electoral roll.

He stressed that no individual should be included in the electoral roll merely on the basis of personal acquaintance or sympathy. He urged all concerned not to support or protect the inclusion of persons who are not legally eligible to be enrolled in the electoral roll. He further appealed them to not hesitate in reporting names that may have previously appeared in the electoral roll but are liable for deletion.

Assistant Electoral Registration Officer (AERO), Pu Lawrence Lalhlanthara, also briefed the participants on matters relating to the Enumeration Forms. He informed the meeting that if residents were unavailable even after three visits by BLOs for collection of the forms, their names will not be included in the draft electoral roll. In this regard, he appealed to all those present to create public awareness on the importance of the SIR process and encourage timely submission of the Enumeration Forms.

title: MIZORAM LEGISLATIVE ASSEMBLY SPEAKER PU LALBIAKZAMA CHUAN HNAHTHIAL DISTRICT CHHUNGA ZIRLAI TITHATE HNENAH CHAWIMAWINA THILPEK A HLAN
content:
673/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 22nd May, 2026:Mizo Zirlai Pawl, Hnahthial Headquarters buatsaihin GSA Hall, Electric Veng-ah vawiin khan HSLC leh HSSLC-a zirlai tithate chawimawina hun hman a ni a. Legislative Assembly Speaker, Pu Lalbiakzama chuan khuallian ni a hmanpuiin South Tuipui Bialtu MLA, Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua’n chuan Khual Zahawm niin he hun hi a hmanpui bawk.

Khuallian, Pu Lalbiakzama chuan zirna leh hriselna chu bial hmasawnna atana a ngaihpawimawh ber a nih thu sawiin zirna chuan tawp in tai a neih loh thu a sawi a. Zirlai chu mi tumruh leh taima, mi theih ang ti ve thei, mite pawhin a an tum chhin ngai loh pawh tum ngam tur khawpa huaisen nih a tul thu a sawi a. Sawrkar Laipui hna hrang hrangah Mizote kan tling thei ta lo chu a vei thu sawiin UPSC mai ni lovin SSC te pawh Mizo zirlaite chuan exam ve thin se a duh thu a  sawi a. Mizoten kan mamawh hunah chunga thawkte chu an tangkai thin avangin Central Service-ah lut thei tur khawpa tan la turin zirlate chu a chah a. Sawrkar hna kan hmu thei ta kher lo a nih pawhin kan thlen chinah a tha ber nih tum zel tura zirlai kalkhawmte chu fuihin hnahthawktu zahawmna chu a hnathawh hniam leh san aiin a thawktu thawhrimna leh rinawmnaah a innghat zawk a ni tih hre reng turin a duh thu a sawi a ni.

Speaker chuan zirlaite chu phone leh social media an khawih a nih pawhin tunlai thiamna, a bikin AI chu zirchiang a, hmang tangkai turin a chah a. Zirna chu kawng engkima mi hmantlaka min siamtu a nih avangin thlahthlam lo tur leh tum ti sang a, teirei peih tura chahin, eng kawng pawh zawh se an nih theih chinah chuan a tha ber ni zel turin a chah nghal a ni.

Khual Zahawm, Pu Jeje Lalpekhlua chuan thu sawiin he huna chawimawite chu Mizoram pumpuia Hnahthial min tihmingthatute an nih thu a sawi a. He huna zirlai kalkhawmte chu an zirnaah theihtawp chhuah theuh tur leh Hnahthial tihmingthatu, a khaw mi nih tinuamtu ni theuh turin a chah a. Thawhrimna tel lo chuan thiamna ringawt chuan a daih rei loh thu sawiin hlawhtlinna tawng baw tur chuan harsatna paltlang a tul thu a sawi a. Hlawhtlinna kan lo chang a nih pawhin mi harsa zawkte leh thenrual thate leng ve lo khawpa mi hlawhtling ni lo tura zirlaite chu chahin eng dinhmunah pawh awm se, mahni chawr chhuahna chu theihnghilh ngai lo turin a chah a ni.

District Education Officer, Pu Micky Lalenkawla chuan thu sawiin tuna zirlai chawimawite chu a lawmpui rualin a kakpui an thleng chiah a ni tih hre tura a duh thu a sawi a. Tuna atanga kum rei lo te ah eng ang mi nge an nih a, chawimawi tlak an nih leh nih loh chu a rawn lan tur thu a sawi a. Thiamna hmantlak tak tak nei tura chahin kan thiltih chu thinlung leh tihtak zeta kan tih chuan mi chhenfakawm tak kan nih zel tur thu a sawi a ni.

He zirlai thitha chawimawina programme-ah hian Lalramluahpuii d/o C.Lalduhawma, Chanmari Veng, Hnahthial chu HSSLC (Science Stream) ah Mizoram puma pangana a nih avangin MLA Award hlan a ni a. Hnahthial District chhung school-a kal, HSLC exam-a zirlai titha sawm leh pakhat (11) leh HSSLC exam-a zirlai titha sawm (10) te chu chawimawina thlipek hlan an ni a. Hnathial pawna lehkha zir, HSLC leh HSSLC Distinction-a pass zirlai pariat (8) te bakah Hnahthial District chhunga zirlai pass kim nei School pasarih (7) te hnenah chawimawina thilpek hi hlan a ni bawk.

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER HOLDS MEETING ON SPECIAL INTENSIVE REVISION (SIR) 2026
content:
101/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 22nd May 2026:A meeting on the implementation of the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Roll 2026 was held today  under the chairmanship of District Election Officer (DEO) and Deputy Commissioner, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga at his Office chamber.

Addressing the meeting, Shri  Donny Lalruatsanga expressed gratitude to all participants and stated that, as per the programme of the Election Commission of India, the Special Intensive Revision 2026 will be conducted across Mizoram from 20th May to 6th September 2026. He stressed the importance of carrying out the revision process efficiently, transparently, and within the stipulated timeline.

The DEO stated that only genuine citizens of India are eligible to vote and pointed out the possibility of wrongful inclusion or omission of foreigners in the Electoral Roll. Therefore, he emphasized the need for utmost vigilance during the revision process. He urged all Election Officials in Lawngtlai District to put forth their best efforts for the successful conduct of SIR 2026 and appealed to political parties, church leaders, and community leaders to extend full cooperation to Election Officials.

During the meeting, important matters relating to SIR 2026 were discussed. All publicity and awareness materials for the public will be coordinated through DIPRO in collaboration with IPRO (LADC) and the MJA Lawngtlai District. Publicity plans, including banners, flyers, promotional videos, and other awareness materials, were also deliberated upon for wide dissemination among the public.

The Election Officer informed the meeting that printing of the Enumeration Forms is currently underway and is expected to be completed by tonight. Training for BLOs and Additional BLOs will be conducted next Tuesday, during which the Enumeration Forms will also be distributed to all BLOs.To ensure that SIR 2026 is conducted in a free, fair, and transparent manner, EROs and AEROs were instructed to exercise greater vigilance. It was also decided that online meetings on SIR-related matters would be held frequently whenever necessary.

The meeting was attended by EROs, AEROs, Election Officers, IPRO (LADC), and the President of MJA Lawngtlai District. The meeting concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Shri  Donny Lalruatsanga.

title: Press Statement of Honourable Minister for Higher & Technical Education Minister Dr. Vanlalthlana on 22dd May, 2026 at 12:00 PM at Aizawl Press Club
content:

Aizawl the 22nd May, 2026:Higher & Technical Education Minister Dr. Vanlalthlana chuan vawiin chhun dar 12:00 khan Aizawl Press Club-ah tunhnaia Council of Ministers meeting thutlukna pakhat “School Upgradation leh RUSA Faculty Regularisation” chungchangah  Press Conference a nei. Minister hi Pi Ramdinliani, IAS, Secretary, Higher & Technical Education Department leh Pi Angela Zothanpuii, Director, Higher & Technical Education bakah Department official dangte'n an tawiawm a ni.

He huna Higher & Technical Education Minister Press Statement chu hetiang hi a ni:-

PRESS STATEMENT

SCHOOL UPGRADATION LEH RUSA FACULTY REGULARISATION

Ni 18.5.2026 (Thawhtanni)-a Council of Ministers thukhawm chuan thil hrang hrang a ngaihtuah zingah Adhoc School thenkhat Provincialise-na tur leh RUSA hnuaia college zirtirtu lakte dah ngheh dilna chu telh a ni a. Kan thutluknain nghawng nasa tak a neih avang leh ngaihventu thahnem tak an awm avangin, kan thurel chu Press Conference hmanga puanzar tha kan ti a. Mizoram mipuite hriata min puanzarsak turin kan journalist-te kan han insawm a. Heti zat in rawn kal theih avangin lawmthu ka hrilh a che u.

1. SCHOOL UPGRADATION

a. School upgradation hi ni 27.9.2023-a Council of Ministers meeting-in 'Upgradation of Schools' chungchanga memorandum lo lut a pawm tawh, School 340 (180 Provincialisation\ 52 Provisional Adhoc GiA\ 108 Lump sum GiA) dinhmun chawisanna (upgradation) atana thutlukna an siam kal zel kha a ni a.

b. Ni 27.9.2023-a school upgradation atana Council of Ministers-in thuthlukna an siam hi Department of Personnel & Administrative Reforms, Law & Judicial Department leh Finance Department te hriatpuina tel lo a tih a nih avangin ni 18.6.2024-a Council of Ministers thu khawm chuan a ngaihtuah tha leh ta a. School upgrade tura hma lak a nih dawn hian a hnuaia chhan hrang hrangte avangin an zavaiin hnawl rih phawt a ni ta a ni: -

c. Ni 16.10.2024-a Council of Ministers meeting chuan Mizoram Education (Lumpsum Grant-in-Aid for General Maintenance of Private School) Rules, 2024 leh ni 22.9.2023-a Notification hmanga Conditions for Provincialisation of Schools a siamah relaxation engmah a siam loh avangin 'Relaxation Clause' a dah belh leh ta a ni.

d. Ni 13.5.2025-a Council of Ministers meeting chuan felfai zawka Grant-in-Aid School-te kalpui a nih theih nan Study Team a din a. Study Team member-te chu hengte hi an ni: -

Secretary       :           Secretary, SED

Members       :           Dr. Vanlalthlana, Minister

Pu T Lalhlimpuia, MLA

Rev Dr. K Thanzauva, Education Consultant Commissioner & Secretary, DPAR

Secretary, Law & Judicial Department

Secretary, Finance Department

He Study Team-in The Mizoram Education (Lumpsum Grant-in-Aid for general maintenance of Private School) Rules 2025 a siam chu ni 4.2.2026 a Council of Ministers meeting chuan a pawm sak ta a ni.

e. Ni 18.5.2026-a Council of Minister Meeting chuan Annexure I-a school hming tar lante hi Sorkar School (Provincialised) atan a pawm ta a. Heng school-te hi kum 2023-a notification hmanga 'criteria' phate niin, Special Blind School, Durtlang chiah hi criteria pha lo awm chhun a ni. Criteria atan hian 'Power to Relax' clause hi hman niin, kum 2023-a enrollment criteria pha lo pawh kum 4 chhunga enrollmemt chawh rual (4 years average), 2025 enrollment leh 2026 enrollment aṭanga criteria an rawn phak chhoh chuan provincialised tur zingah telh an ni. Higher Secondary School zingah Ngopa HSS-in criteria (80% pass percentage leh enrollement 80/40) pha lovin pass percentage-a a phak lohna zawk hi ngaihdam a ni a. Chutichuan, provincialisation atana Council of Ministers meeting-in a chhawp chhuah tak chu school 51 an ni ta a. 2023 kuma criteria pha si, kum 2026-a an enrollment tla hniam nasa ta lutukte chu school-ah kal chilhin, a hmunah en dik nghal an ni ang.

Tuna Adhoc School ni mek, provincialised theih tak lohte hi Special Category 1 School ah dah an ni ang a. Tuna Adhoc School-a thawk mekte hian zirtirtu nghet (regular teacher) ang chiahin 'Full Basic Pay + Full Allowance' an la tawh ang a. Tun hmaa an neih thin 'Death-cum-Retirement-Gratuity' atan Rs.4 lakh pek leh an ni ang.

f. 'The Mizoram Education (Lumpsum Grant-in-Aid for general Maintenance of Private School) Rules, 2025' hi chiang zawka sawi fiah a ngai a. A tlangpuia han tar lan theih chu a hnuai ami hi a ni: -

i. Lumpsum GiA School-te hi Special Category 1, Special Category 2 leh Lumpsum Aided Schools anga then hran an ni a. An pawisa dawn zat tur chu Annexure II-ah tar lan a ni.

ii. Tehfung (criteria) tihhniam a ni a. School zirlai tla hniam zel an awm chuan an dinhmun tihhniam emaw zirlai an neih loh chuan Aided School an nihna emaw tihtawp thlenga hma lak theih a ni tawh ang.

iii. He rules hi hman tan a nih tawh dawn avangin Provisional Adhoc School a awm thei tawh dawn lo a. Special Category 2-ah dah vek niin Annexure III-ah tar lan a ni.

iv. Special Category 1 leh Special Category 2-a luh theih dan chu AnnexureIV-ah tar lan a ni.

v. Tuna Adhoc School ni lai mek Special Category 1-a awm turte leh Special Category 2-a awm turte hian kum 5 chhungin minimum enrollment an neih ngei ngei tur chu Rule 3(5)-ah tar lan a ni a (Annexure V). An phak thei lo a nih chuan an dinhmun hi ngaihtuah that a ni ang.

g. 'The Mizoram Education (Lumpsum Grant-in-Aid for General Maintenance of Private School) Rules, 2025' hmangin Adhoc School te (Provincialised tak loh te) leh Provisional Adhoc School ni tura lo tih tawhte chu Special Category 1 leh Special Category 2-ah dah an ni dawn a. Kum 2023 a tehfung (criteria) hautak deuh pawh kha tihhniam a ni tawh a. Tehfung a hniam rual hian school an tlak hniam chuan an dinhmun pawh tla hniam thei dinhmunah a siam tawh thung a. Zirtirtute pawh an tan nasat leh zual a ngai tawh dawn a ni. Pro-Adhoc-a lo puan tawhte kha a takin kalpui ta ila chuan zirtirtu tinin personal file nei tawhin, an file khawih tur ringawt pawhin mi 8 rawih belh an ngai dawn a ni.

h. Mi tam takin beiseina sang tak nena an lo hmuah tilettu nih hi a namai lo a. Kalna apianga zawhna tam tak leh chhuahchhaltu tawn tawn fo mai hi Chief Minister leh a changtu Minister tan hian rilru leh taksa tana phurrit lian tak a ni. Adhoc School a tam thei ang ber Provincialise leh Pro-Adhoc-a puan tawhte pawh kalpui chhunzawm kan duh hle a. A Minister ang phei chuan vawi 5 lai he upgradation hi Council of Ministers meeting-ah ka pu lut tawh a ni. Sorkar sumin a phak tawk leh tehna siam sa hmangin hma kan la chauh a ni a. Provincialised tak lohte hi kan ngaihsak lo bik tihna a ni hauh lo a. Tehna awm sa hmangin, Adhoc School-te tan, a huam zau thei ang berin hma kan la zawk a ni tih min hriatpui turin Adhoc School zirtirtute leh an chhungte ka ngen tak meuh a ni.

2. RUSA ASSISTANT PROFESSOR REGULARISATION

School Education Department leh Higher and Technical Department-a kan official-te an thawk hah hle mai a. Anni thawh hah zarah tun hun hi kan thleng thei a. An chungah lawmthu ka sawi tak meuh a.

Zirna min ngaih pawimawhsaktu Pu Lalduhoma, kan CM chungah School Education Department leh Higher & Technical Education Minister ka nih angin lawmthu ka sawi a. A kaihhruaina hnuaiah hian zirnain nasa takin hma a sawnin State University, Engineering College, faculty member lak tharte, School Upgradation leh cess hmanga zirna atana sum awm belhte hi tangkai taka kan hman chuan kan zirna dinhmun hian hma a sawn ngei kan beisei tlat a. Heng hmalaknate hi a taka kalpui a nih theih nan kan official-te leh zirtirtute pawhin kan theih tawp kan rawn chhuah zel ang.

Ka lawm e.

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER HOVIN SPECIAL INTENSIVE REVISION (SIR) 2026 KALPUI DAN TUR REL A NI
content:
669/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 22nd May 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Office Chamber-ah  'Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Roll 2026' kalpui tur sawihona neih a ni a.  District Election Officer (DEO) leh Bawrhsap nibawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan a kairhuai.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte chungah lawmthu a sawi a. Election Commission of India ruahmanna angin 'Special Intensive Revision 2026' chu  May ni 20 atanga September Ni 6, 2026 chhungin Mizoramah kalpui tur a ni, a ti a. SIR 2026 - tha felfai taka  kalpui leh huntiam chhunga zawh chu tihmakmawh a ni tiin, a hun taka zo fel tura hmalak a nih tur thu a sawi a. India khua leh tui dik takte chauhin Vote an nei thei a, E/Roll a  Foreigners - thun palh emaw,  hmaih palh neih emaw pawh a thei a ni a, hemi kawngah hian fimkhur a tul hle a ti. DEO chuan Lawngtlai District - a SIR 2026 felfai taka kalpui turin Election Official - te theihtawp chhuah tur leh , Political Party, Kohhran leh khawtlang hruaitute chu thahnem ngai taka Election Official- te lo thawhpui turin a sawm a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian thil pawimawh tak tak sawiho a ni a. SIR 2026 chungchanga hriattur pawimawh leh mipuite tana puanzar ngai zawng zawng chu DIPRO kutah dah niin, IPRO (LADC), IPRO (LADC) leh MJA Lawngtlaite nen thawkho tura tih an ni a. Publicity Plan - sawiho niin, Banner, Flyers, Promotional Video, leh tul dangte siama, mipuite hnenah thehdarh ni se an ti a ni. Election Officer chuan 'Enumeration form' print mek niin, zaninah zawhfel a beisei awm thu a tarlang a. Kar leh Tuesday ah BLO leh Additional BLO- te training neihpui an ni dawn a, hemi hunah hian

'Enumeration form' hi BLO theuhte pekchhuah an ni dawn a ni. SIR 2026 - fel fai, tha leh thianghlim tak nei turin  ERO leh AERO - te fimkhur zual ni se, SIR chungchangah a tam thei ang ber 'Online Meeting' pawh neih thin ni se an ti a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian ERO, AERO, Election Officer, IPRO (LADC),  leh President, MJA Lawngtlai District - te an tel thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

title: LR&S Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova'n MZP Headquarters Lunglei buatsaih "Mizo Zirlai Ti Ṭha Chawimawina 2026 & Career Awareness" hun a hmanpui
content:
667/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 22:Vawiin khan Mizo Zirlai Pawl (MZP) Headquarters Lunglei te'n Saikuti Hall-a kum 2026 HSLC leh HSSLC Exam-a "Mizo Zirlai Ti Ṭha Chawimawina 2026 & Career Awareness" hun an buatsaih chu Land Revenue & Settlement (LR&S) Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan Khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Khuallian Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan zirlaite zahna chibai bukin, zirna leh hma lam hun lo kal zel turah rilru put hmang dik a pawimawh thu leh mahni inrin ngam leh inpawm ngam a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Mahni inngaih nep leh mi dangin kan tih theih an rin loh pawh thei lo tura inngaih loh tur a ni tiin, Pathianin siam chhan min nei a, eng emaw tak ka la ni ve ang tih rilru pu chunga, hlawhtling tura beih ṭang ṭang a pawimawh, a ti a. Kum naupan avanga inthlahdah leh muanchan a pawi tiin, zirlaite chu puitlin zir a, tun aṭanga theih tawpa inbuatsaih turin a chah.

Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan harsatna hi remchang a ni a, harsatna pal tlang tam apiang an tlo va, anmahni aṭangin thu fing, zir tlak a chhuak ṭhin tiin, retheihna, rilru natna leh hun harsa leh khirh inhnehtir lo va, tum ruhna nen hma lam pan a, a ṭha lam um zel turin zirlaite a fuih a. Mahni intihrehawm ngamte, nawmna kalsan ngamte'n hlawhtlinna an chan ṭhin thu leh mahni intihhrehawm chu din chhuahna, pangchan chu eng mah nih lohna a nih thu sawiin, zirlaite chu pangchang leh no lutuk lo tur te, mahni inkhawngaihna rilru pu lo tur te, nu leh pate pawh mahni fate duat lutuk lo va, an hrehawm phal tur te'n a chah a. Lehkha zir nasat a ṭhat thu leh finna leh hlawhtlinna a nih thu sawiin, zirlaite chu ni khatah darkar 8–13 inkar tal zir turin a chah a. Tlawm duh lohna, tum ruhna leh nun uluk avangin mi an hlawhtling ṭhin tih sawiin, zirlaite chu chuti ang mi ni tur chuan a fuih a. MZP te'n zirlaite hmakhaw ngaia an hma laknaah lawm thu sawiin, duhsakna a hlan nghal.

He hunah hian Lunglei Municipal Council (LMC) Chairman Pu Lalzuithanga leh councillor-te, sawrkar official-te, MZP, MSU, YMA, MHIP, MJA leh political party hruaitute, zirlaite leh zirtirtute leh zirlai nu leh pate an tel a. MZP Headquarters Lunglei Vice President C. Lalsiamthara'n hun kaihruaiin, BCM Education Director Rev. RC Lalthanzama'n hunserh a hmang a. Secretary K. Lalchhuanawma'n MZP Headquarters Lunglei hma lakna report pein, President H. Lalhmingmawia'n zirlaite fuihna thu a sawi a. MZP General Headquarters ai awhin General Secretary C. Lalhmingsanga'n thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian Private Secretary to Minister & Under Secretary, LR&S Pu Remlalliana Hnamte, MCS chu resource person niin, zirlaite hma hun atana kaihhruaina leh kawng kawhhmuhna hun a hmang a. ECHS Polyclinic Lungleia Officer-in-Charge Maj. MS Dawngsanga (Retd) chuan zirlaite fuihna leh sipaia luh dan a sawi bawk a. Khuallian leh resource person-te bakah, LMC Secretary & DCSO Pu Lalremruata Sailo, MCS; Assistant Commissioner (Revenue) Pi Jennifer Vanlalhruaii Pachuau, MCS; Sub-Deputy Commissioner & Assistant Controller P&S Pi Lalnunchhani Hnamte, MCS leh Deputy Director & DIPRO Lunglei Pu C. Lalhruaitluanga, MIS te'n zirlaite zawhna chhangin, zirna, ei zawnna leh ni tin nuna zirlaite tana hriat tur pawimawh tak tak an sawi bawk.

Vawiina zirlai ti ṭhate chawimawina hun buatsaihah hian MZP Headquarters Lunglei huam chhunga zirlai ti ṭhate – HSLC & HSSLC 2026-a Top 10-a lang zirlai pathum te; 100% pass result nei zirna in 16 te; HSLC Distinction-a pass zirlai 77 leh HSSLC Distinction-a pass zirlai 38 (Arts-ah 30 leh Science-ah 8) te hnenah chawimawina thuziak hlan a ni a. HSLC 2026-a Mizoram puma 9-na LH Laltleipuii (d/o LH Lalbiakenga), Holy Faith School hnenah Pu Lalṭhazuala (Fam) te chhungkuain Lunglei aṭanga HSLC-a ti ṭha ber hnena an hlan ṭhin DENGRO Award (kum 2018 aṭanga kalpui) chu hlan a ni bawk a. Award hian tangkafai ₹10,000/- a keng tel.

HSLC & HSSLC 2026-a Top 10-a lang zirlai chawimawina hlante chu:

(1) LH Laltleipuii (d/o LH Lalbiakenga), Holy Faith School – HSLC-a 9-na

(2) K. Zomuanpuia (s/o K. Zohmangaiha), Baptist HSS – HSSLC (Science)-a 2-na

(3) HC Malsawmtluanga (s/o HC Lalsangvunga), Baptist HSS – HSSLC (Arts)-a 8-na.

title: CHAMPHAIAH SPECIAL INTENSIVE REVISION (SIR), 2026 KALPUI DAN TUR CHUNGCHANG SAWIHONA NEI
content:
666/2026-2027

Champhai dated 22nd May, 2026: Vawiin khan Special Intensive Revision (SIR), 2026 kalpui tura inpuahchah dan tur ngaihtuahin DC Conference Hall, Keifangtlangah District Level Standing Committee an thukhawm.

He hun hi Pu Lalbiakfela Addl DC, Champhai chuan a kaihruai a, Pu Ngulzathuama Election Officer-in Special Intensive Revision, 2026 kalpui dan tur sawifiahna hun a nei a ni.

Election Commission of India chuan Article 324 of the Constitution of India, Section 21 of the Representation of People Act leh Registration of Elector Rules, 1960 te'n thuneihna a pek angin India rama State leh Union Territory zawng zawngah Special Intensive Revision of Electoral Roll a kalpui mek a, Mizoramah pawh SIR hi May ni 20 atang khan kalpui tan a ni a, September ni 6, 2026 thleng a awh dawn a ni. Champhai District ah pawh SIR kalpui tur hian inbuatsaihna engkim peihfel thawkhat tawh a ni a, Electoral Roll-a chuang mek voter zawng zawngte tan Enumeration Form peih fel tawh a ni a, hemi pual hian ERO, AERO, BLO Supervisor leh BLO te bakah Political Party aiawh Booth Level Agency te tan training buatsaih tura ruahhmanna siam a ni bawk.

SIR hi kalpui a nih hma hian Mizoram chhunga SIR hnuhnung ber kum 2005-a Roll-a chuangte leh an thlahte enmil hna chu thla engemawzat kalpui a ni tawh a, Mizoram Elector pumpui atangin za zela 81.57 chu enmil tawh an ni a, Champhai District bikah hian za zela 86.32 enmil an ni tawh bawk. Enumeration form leh kum tling tharte tan form 6 leh declaration form te hi BLO te'n in tinah an sem dawn a, BLO te hian an lakhawm leh vek dawn a, form fill up thiam lote an pui nghal dawn bawk a ni.

Tun tum Special Intensive Revision-ah hian Electoral Roll hi a thar hlaka buatsaih tur a ni dawn a, a hun chhunga Enumeration form thehlut lote chu Draft Electoral Roll-ah an chuang dawn lova, vote la nei lo anga ngaih niin a thar hlakin an dil a ngai tawh dawn a, EPIC thar pek an ni ang a, an EPIC number ngai an hmang thei tawh dawn lo a ni.

He hunah hian SIR kalpui laia Political Party te mawhphurhna kawng hrang hrang sawifiah a ni a, Enumeration form dah khah dan turte chipchiar taka sawifiah a ni bawk.

Assembly Constituency 3 awm mekah SIR 2005 ah khan Electors 39,168 an awm a, 23-Champhai North A/C ah 14,029, 24-Champhai South A/C ah 13,155 leh 25-East Tuipui ah 11,984 te an awm a, kum 2026 May thla thleng hian Electors 58,850 an awm tawh a, 23-Champhai North A/C ah 20,438, 24-Champhai South A/C ah 22,444 leh 25 East Tuipui ah 15,968 te an awm mek a, Polling Station hi 30 a awm mek bawk.

Meetingah hian khawtlang hruaitu department hotu, VC, YMA, MUP te bakah Political Party aiawhte an kalkhawm a ni.

title: TELECOM REGULATORY AUTHORITY OF INDIA (TRAI) TEN SERCHHIP-AH CONSUMER OUTREACH PROGRAMME AN BUATSAIH
content:
665/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, 22ndMay 2026:Vawiin khan India Rama Telecom service lama thuneitu sang Telecom Regulatory Authority Of India (TRAI) te chuan Serchhip-ah Consumer-te nenea intawhkhawmna hun ‘Consumer Outreach Programme’ an buatsaih a. He Programme Serchhip Sub Hqrs. YMA Conference Hall-a hmanah hian Serchhip Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma chu khuallian niin, Serchhip Superintendent of Police Gavit Gogna, IPS chu khualzahawm a ni a,  Advisor, TRAI Regional Office Kolkata Shri Kaushik Mukherjee chuan inkhawm hi a kaihruai a ni.

Serchhip Baswrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan Mizoram-a a vawi 3-na atan Serchhip-ah hetiang Programme tha leh hlu tak buatsaih a ni thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawi a. Telecom Regulation Act hnuaiah consumer ten dikna chanvo (right) tam tak an neih thu sawiin, Serchhip District chu  lehkha thiam, ziak leh chhiar thiam tamna ber an nih angin, telecom service chungchangah a ni emaw,eh thil dangah a ni emaw, consumer-te dikna chanvote hi mipuite’n kan hriattlan a pawimawh tih a sawi a. Buaina leh harsatna kan nei a nih pawhin ‘dan hnuaiah felfai leh zahawm taka complain nachang hriat a pawimawh a ni’ a ti bawk. Serchhip District-in Consumer Association chak tak an nei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawi bawk a, vawiina he hun hmangtu zawng zawngte chu consumer-te dikna leh chanvote hre thar a, tangkai leh hlawk taka hun hmang theuh turin a chah bawk a ni.

He huna khualzahawm Serchhip SP Pu Gavit Gogna IPS pawhin tunlai khawvel thiamna sang tawh tak karah Telephone leh Internet hmangtute’n mahni hming leh nihna diktak hmanga Sim card neih a pawimawh thu a sawi a, chu chuan Cell/Mobile phone tih bo leh inbumna hrang hrang  Cyber Security & Cyber Offensive thleng thin lakah Police te tana hnu chhui a tih awlsam bik thu a sawi bawk.

Ashim Dutta, Jt. Adviser, TRAI leh Mizoram-a Telecom hotute atangin mipuite hriat tur pawiamawh chi   hrang hrangte, a lem nen sawifiah a nih bakah, Pi Larinzuali MPS, SDPO Serchhip hnen atangin 'Cyber Crime Awareness' chungchang ngaihthlak a ni a, zawhna leh chhanna hun hlawk tak hman ho a ni bawk.

Vawiina huna hmannaah hian Serchhip District Consumer Association hruaitu te, District Sub Hqrs. YMA leh District  MUP hruaitu te, Govt. Serchhip Higher Secondary School leh Govt. Serchhip  College-a   zirlai te, Serchhip District chhunga Telecom service provider hrang hrangte bakah tualchhung chanchinbumite an tel a ni.

title: CHHUANTHAR TLANGNUAM-AH PUANTAH TRAINING LEH KHAWL (ZO LOOM) SEMNA HUN HMAN A NI; AGRICULTURE MINISTER-IN HUN A HMANPUI
content:
663/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, 22ndMay 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram Handloom & Handicrafts Development Corporation Limited (ZOHANDCO) hmalaknain puantah zirna Handloom Training leh puantahna khawl (Zo Loom) semna hun CT Hall, Chhuanthar Tlangnuam-ah hman a ni. Agriculture & Farmers' Welfare Minister Pu P.C. Vanlalruata’n khuallian niin hun a hmanpui a, ZOHANDCO Managing Director Pu L.P. Lalchangkima'n hun hawnna inkhawm hi a kaihruai a ni.

Khuallian Pu PC Vanlalruata chuan Chhuanthar Tlangnuam mipuite taihmakna leh thawhrimna fakin, puan tah lama hma an lakna turah pawh beiseina sang tak a neih thu a sawi a. Puana sum dawnna hi Mizoram economy chawi nungtu pawimawh tak pakhat a nih thu sawiin, Mizo kutchhuakte chawinung tura ZOHANDCO te hmalaknaah lawmthu a sawi a. ZOHANDCO kaltlangin ram pawna mizo kutchhuak puan leh thiamhnangdeh chi hrang hrangte zawrhchhuahna tur pawh zawn zel a nih thu sawiin, India ram khawpui – Delhi, Bangalore leh Kolkata-ahte pawh mizo kutchhuak thil zawrhna ‘Made By Mizo’ dawr hawnna tur pawhin hma lak mek a nih thu leh inbiakna kalpui mek a nih thu a sawi bawk. Mizote kutchhuak chawisan chu sawrkarin a ngai pawimawh hle tih sawiin ZOHANDCO hmalaknaa Chhuanthar mipuite tana puantah khawl 9 zet sem theih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Training turte pawh thiamna tak tak pawchhuaka, mahni kea ding thei tur leh Mizoram tana malsawmna ni turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Training hi thla khat chhung neih phawt tur niin, mi 45 an tel dawn a, trainer thiam tak takte'n an thutchhilh dawn a ni. A tirah chuan puan ban sa hmangin zirtirna an nei phawt dawn a, hei bakah hian mi 2 thlang chhuakin, puan ban, hnahchawi thil, reed thil leh a tul dangte zir belh turin Aizawl lamah training kalpui leh turin ruahmanna siam a ni bawk.

Vawiin hun hmanna-ah hian ZOHANDCO Chairman Pu J.K. Dawngzuala hnen atangin an hmalakna tlangpui ngaihthlak a ni a; Pu Rodingluaia, Assistant Manager, ZOHANDCO-in Training kalpui dan tur leh puan tah khawl chungchanga Technical Report a pe bawk a. He hun hmanpuitu Mizoram Khadi & Village Industries Board (MKVIB) Chairman Pu C. Lalremliana pawhin thu sawiin, Mizo thalaite’n mizo thiamhnangdeh lamah inzirtirna leh training uar lehzuala kan neih a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Multidisciplinary Training Centre Aizawl-ah Training duh tan kawng a inhawn thu a sawi bawk. Chhuanthar Tlangnuam Village Council President Pu Dawngzela'n lawmthu sawiin hun hi a khar a, chawhnu lamah Demonstration neih zui a ni.

title: Tlawmngai Pawl leh Party Hruaitute tan Special Intensive Revision chungchanga hriattur pawimawh inhrilhriatna hun hmang
content:
662/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 22nd May, 2026:Vawiin khan Hnahthial DC Meeting Hall No– II ah Electoral Registration Officer (ERO) leh Addl DC ni bawk, Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte kaihhruaiin tlawmngai pawl hrang hrang - YMA, MHIP leh MUP –te bakah MJA member leh political party block hruaitute tan Special Intensive Revision (SIR) chungchanga hriattur pawimawh inhrilhhriatna hun hman a ni a. ERO chuan SIR chu Electoral Roll (e-roll) thianghlim leh felfai kan neih theihna hun remchang tak a nih avangin roll felfai neih a nih theih nan he huna kalkhawmte chu thawhho puiah a sawm nghal a ni.

ERO chuan e-roll a awm sa kha SIR-ah chuan rin a nih tawh dawn loh thu sawiin hetianga Intensive Roll Revision neih hnuhnun ber chu kum 2002-2004 khan a nih thu a sawi a. BLO-te chuan in tinah Enumeration Form sem a, an va khawn leh vek a tul tawh tur thu sawiin chu Enumeration form lakkhawm atang chuan draft roll siam a nih tur thu a sawi a. Tun dinhmunah hian Mapping-ah 15% vel hi e-roll a chuang lo an awm thu tarlangin chung ho bakah enumeration form fill up loh vang emaw, thil dang engemaw vanga draft roll-a awm lo te tan Hearing neih a tul tur thu a sawi bawk.

ERO chuan tun thutkhawmna a kohkhawmte chu khawtlang mi leh sa hrechiang tura an ngaih, e-roll felfai tak neih a nih theih nana mi pawimawh tak tak te an nih thu a sawi a. Tupawh kan hriat rei tawh vang emaw, kan khawngaih vang emaw ringawta e-roll a thun theih an nih loh thu sawiin dan ang taka e-roll a thun theih loh chu hum tlat lo turin a chah a. A hma a e-roll a lo chuang tawh, chuang tur ni si lo, paih ngaite pawh sawi hreh loh turin a chah nghal a ni.

Assistant Electoral Registration Officer (AERO), Pu Lawrence Lalhlanthara chuan Enumeration form chungchang sawifiahin In tinah copy hnih sem a nih tur thu a sawi a. BLO –ten an Inah vawi thum khawn tuma an kal hnu pawh a an awm loh chuan Draft roll-ah ziahluh an nih theih dawn loh avangin kalkhawmte chu mipuite hnenah he SIR pawimawhna chu lo hrilh darh turin a chah a ni.

title: Autonomous District Council huam chhunga minor minerals atanga chhiah lak insem dan tur rel
content:
661/2026-2027Aizawl dated 22nd May 2026 :Vawiin khan Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining Minister Pu F Rodingliana Office Chamber-ah State Sorkar leh Autonomous District Council ten Danin a phut anga Minor Minerals (lung, balu, brick earth/clay) atanga Royalty (chhiah) hmuhte insem dan tur mi pawimawhten an rel.

Chhiah (royalty) insem dan tur Department lamin rawtna an siamte Autonomous District Council huam chhunga MLA te nen sawihona hun an hmang a. Geology & Mining Joint Director Department Er. Lalremmawia chuan powerpoint presentation pein Minor Minerals atanga royalty (chhiah) insem dan tur India Danpui (Constitution) leh Mining Dan (Legislation) a tarlan te a sawifiah a. Hemi zawh hian sawihona hun neih a ni.

India Constituiton 6th Schedule Para 9(ii) in a sawi angin Autonomous District Council Area chhunga heng mineral te hi State Sorkarin phalna pein a enkawl tur a ni a, a chhiah(royalty) pawh a khawn tur a ni. Heng royalty a hmuh atang hian Autonomous District Council te hnenah an chanvo (share) an pe ve tur a ni a. India rama State 4-Assam, Mizoram, Meghalaya leh Tripura ten 6th Schedule area neiin Autonomous District Council an nei hlawm a. Heng State dang pathumten royalty an insem (share) mek dan zirchianna leh sawihona hun an hmang a ni.

Tuna Mizoram chhunga kalpui danah chuan Autonomous District Council ten heng minor mineral te hi enkawlin royalty pawh an la chang vek a. Amaherawhchu, heng Minor Minerals te hi State-in a enkawlin royalty pawh a khawn zawk tur a ni tih tarlan niin India Constitution leh Mining Dan (Legislation) anga kalpui tawh turin royalty insem dan tur Department in ruahmanna a siam te sawiho a ni a. Tuna Geology & Mining Department ten proposal an siam hi Sorkar lamah ngaihtuah tura thehluh phawt ni se tiin an rel.

He sawihonaah hian Pi Prova Chakma, MLA West Tuipui; Pu Rasik Mohan Chakma, MLA Tuichawng; Pu C Ngunlianchunga, MLA Lawngtlai West; Dr. K Beichhua, MLA Siaha; Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah, MLA Lawngtlai East; Dr H Lianzela, Secretary Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining; Pu J. Chamliana Director Geology & Mining bakah Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining-a Official te an tel a ni.

title: ADVISER TO CHIEF MINISTER HOVIN BANA KAIH SCHEME THLIRLETNA HUN HMAN A NI
content:
660/2026-2027Aizawl dated 22nd May 2026 :Mizoram Sawrkar flagship Scheme - Bana Kaih Scheme kalpui meka loan dawng tawh, Progress Partner leh Chief Minister Special Package dawngtute hmalakna thlirletna hun chu I&PR Auditorium, Treasury square, Aizawlah neih a ni a. Pu Lalfakzuala, CEO, Handholding Scheme chuan he hun hi kaihruaiin, Dr. KC Lalmalsawmzauva Adviser to Chief Minister (Implementation of Handholding Scheme), Pu David Lalthantluanga, Secretary, Planning & Programme Implementation Department, Mizoram State Project Coordination Committee member-te, Bana Kaih Scheme Implementing Department-a Nodal Officer-te bakah Bana Kaih Scheme thawhpui bank; SBI, MRB, MCAB leh UBI hotute an tel a ni.

Dr. KC Lalmalsawmzauva, Adviser to Chief Minister (Implementation of Handholding Scheme) chuan Sawrkar hmalakna hlawhtlinna chu Project kalpui tan a nih atanga uluk taka vil zui a nih thu sawiin, hmalakna vil zuina hian Project hlawhtlinna tura inher rem ngaihna laite, kalphung thlak ngaihna laite a chinfel zung zung thin thu a sawi. Mizoram Sawrkar flagship Scheme - Bana Kaih Scheme kaltlanga mi taima leh theihna nei, ram tih hmasawnna kawnga Sawrkar thawhpui thei tura Progress Partner atana thlan chhuahte hmalakna a hlawhtlin lehzual nan Implementing Department-a thawktuten uluk taka an enzuia, thawm chak an ngaihna lai apiangah thuam tha zel turin Nodal Officer kalkhawmte chu a chah a ni.

Pu KC Lalmalsawmzauva chuan Handholding Scheme kaltlanga loan late leh Chief Minister Special Package dawngtute zingah hmasawn pui tam tak an awm rualin hmasawn pui vak lo pawh an awm theih thu a tarlang a. Hlawhtlin pui ve lote harsatnate zirchian leh hlawhtling ve tura an harsatna sutkian a nih theih nan Implementing Department-a mithiam ten an hmalakna a hmun ah ngei zirchianga, bana kaih an mamawhna laiah hlawhtling tura kai kal zel turin a fuih bawk a ni.

Pu David Lalthantluanga, Secretary, Planning & Programme Implementation Department chuan Mizoram Sawrkar flagship Scheme - Bana Kaih Scheme chu ram tih hmasawnna tura Implementating department hrang hrangte thawhhona hnuaia hmalakna a nih thu a sawi a. Progress Partner thlanchhuah ten hlawhtlinna tluan tling an neih theih nan Implementing Department-te tanrual a pawimawh thu a sawi.

Vawiin a Bana Kaih Scheme hnuaia Progress Partner thlanchhuahte leh Chief Minister Special Package dawngtute hmalakna thlirletna hun ah hian State Bank of India aiawh tarlan danin, loan dawng thei tura mi thlan chhuah 101 an awm a. Loan pek chhuah tawh hi cheng Vbc. 9.46 ni tawhin, loan pek chhuah hmabak mi 49 a awm mek a ni. Mizoram Rural Bank hnuaiah loan pek tur mi 286 awmin, 164 pekchhuah tawh a ni a. Loan pek chhuah tawh hi cheng Vbc. 22.06 a ni. Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank kaltlanga Bana Kaih Scheme hnuaia loan dilna lut 105 atangin 56 chu pek chhuah tawh a ni a, cheng Vbc. 9.35 a ni.

Implementing Department tin atangin Bana Kaih Scheme hnuaia Progress Partner leh Chief Minister Special Package dawngtute hmalakna dinhmun chu Powerpoint presentation hmangin enho a ni a. Bank lamin harsatna an neihte chinfel dan tur leh Monitoring chak lehzuala kalpui a nih theih dan tur sawi ho a ni a. Bana Kaih Scheme kal hmang zau zawka inzirtirna leh Bana Kaih Scheme kaltlanga hlawhtlinna changte lawmpuina hun buatsaih dan turte sawi ho a ni bawk.
